title: Edit "My Tickets" button
excerpt:
Description
We’d like the ability to change the text on the “My Tickets” button in the Help Center portal 
What are you trying to achieve
feature request, ability to edit UI for more customization

posts.author: emmerscaletech (EmmerScale Tech Support)
